name: Detection of Turla URL IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC is recognized as a known Turla URL.

Note: The rules Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events have been excluded from this rule to avoid repetition, their purpose is to have a dedicated rule response.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches "URL" is not null AQL filter query
when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Known Turla URLs', "URL") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Detection of Turla URL IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches "URL" is not null AQL filter query
AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Known Turla URLs', "URL") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detection of Turla URL IOC in Events
Event description: Detects when an IOC is recognized as a known Turla URL host.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
